BadRequest.description: Invalid request body or command payload

Conflict.description: Command is stale, mismatched, expired, or not pending

InternalError.description: Session binding, driver routing, or command completion failed

NotFound.description: Session, run, or route was not found

Unauthorized.description: Bearer token is missing or invalid

Unavailable.description: The durable command identity store is unavailable or at capacity

ConversationLiveProvisionalAnchor.description: Process-local observation only; never a durable display order.

ConversationQueueGeneration.description: Opaque queue CAS generation. Clients must echo it unchanged.

SessionCatalogEntry.description: Compact historical metadata only; message and tool bodies are absent.

info.description: Localhost-only adapter surface for desktop and future local clients.
info.title: Sigil Local App Server API

get.summary: Read this authenticated local API description

post.summary: Submit an approval decision for a pending tool call

200.description: Continuous text/event-stream until terminal, disconnect, lag, or shutdown

get.summary: Replay durable run events then follow live events
Read immutable local server bootstrap metadata

get.description: Reconciles the rebuildable SQLite projection from durable JSONL sources, then returns a generation-consistent keyset page. Active run, approval, and progress state are not included.
get.summary: List durable historical sessions for the current workspace

post.description: Replans and compares the opaque plan digest before the first mutation, then returns a per-item best-effort receipt. The operation is not an atomic transaction across session files.
post.summary: Execute one confirmed session catalog batch

post.description: Reconciles current durable catalog truth, classifies each selected identity, and returns a content-bound plan without mutating any session source.
post.summary: Preview one exact bounded session catalog batch

post.description: Rejects pinned or active sessions, then applies the existing content-bound preview/delete lifecycle and evicts idle adapter handles.
Revalidates the invalid source fingerprint under a maintenance lease, then permanently removes the regular file after native-shell confirmation.
post.summary: Permanently delete one exact invalid local session source

post.description: Revalidates the invalid source metadata under a maintenance lease, then moves it into the local quarantine directory without exposing a filesystem path.
post.summary: Quarantine one exact invalid local session source

post.description: Appends a bounded display-name decision to workspace lifecycle truth, then refreshes the rebuildable catalog projection.
Revalidates the relative session reference and expected durable identity against current lifecycle and JSONL truth. SQLite catalog rows are candidates, not authorization.

200.description: New or existing idempotent local session snapshot

post.summary: Reopen a durable workspace session as a local handle

get.description: Projects safe child-agent status, objective, bounded result summary and usage. Child session references, paths, hashes and raw tool arguments are excluded.
get.summary: Read bounded child-agent lifecycle and result handoff state

get.description: Revalidates the durable session frontier and returns one nested process-local foreground owner with an opaque revision for exact attach admission.
get.summary: Probe durable frontier and current foreground ownership

get.description: Returns stable identity/order projection from scope-checked append-only session truth. Durable sequences use decimal strings; raw durable scope, paths, checksums, credentials and tool arguments are excluded.

parameters.description: Opaque backwards cursor bound to one fixed durable frontier
parameters.name: cursor

get.summary: Read one canonical durable conversation display page

get.description: Returns a bounded, secret-free queue view. Prompt hashes and process-local exact prompt material are excluded; generation is opaque and must be echoed unchanged.

post.description: Routes one idempotent enqueue, edit, remove, reorder, pause, resume, or owner-bound interrupt-and-run-next command under the opaque queue generation CAS guard.

200.description: Durable queue command receipt without exact prompt material

post.summary: Apply one exact follow-up queue command

get.description: Projects exact digest-bound recovery choices without mutating files or session truth.
get.summary: Read durable checkpoint and conversation-fork choices

post.description: Revalidates checkpoint digest, current file hashes, restorable snapshots, and bounded reverse diffs. No mutation is applied.
post.summary: Preview one exact controlled-file checkpoint restore

post.description: Routes one idempotent exactly-bound recovery command under durable session mutation exclusion. Restore affects only controlled durable file mutations; shell, network, remote, manual, and external side effects are not undone.
post.summary: Apply one exact compaction, checkpoint restore, or conversation fork

post.description: Builds and locally proves the exact post-compaction provider request without appending a compaction lifecycle attempt. A ready preview is process-local and must be explicitly applied before it becomes stale.
post.summary: Preview one exact portable context compaction

get.description: Projects the durable session model identity and latest provider usage without exposing server-private paths or inventing missing context values.

200.description: Typed run context for the next run

get.summary: Read typed model, permission-mode, and context usage facts

post.summary: Start a run in a session

get.description: Projects user, assistant and tool-result text from scope-checked append-only session truth. System/control entries, tool arguments, resolved image bytes and server-private paths are excluded.

parameters.description: Exclusive one-based message ordinal for the next older page
parameters.name: before

200.description: Bounded transcript page in chronological order

get.summary: Read one bounded chronological page of durable conversation messages
Project the current task verification recommendation and evidence

post.summary: Rerun one exact stale-safe recommended verification check

post.description: Returns bounded JSON only to the native desktop client. The renderer does not receive the bundle content or a filesystem path.
post.summary: Build a private redacted support bundle

get.description: Returns only the frozen path-free support projection. Credentials, local paths, conversation content, tool payloads, and file content are excluded.
